---
title: "State of the art: background, motivation, and scope"
root: ".."
---

::: {.callout-note}
This page is a **scaffold**. Replace placeholder text with your own writing and add citations. This chapter should define the scope of the rest of the analysis.
:::

## Background and motivation

*Placeholder:* Briefly summarise:
- Why AD research has relied on specific populations historically
- Consequences for prevention and diagnosis tools
- Ethical and scientific motivations for inclusion

## Scope of this project

This website focuses on:
- A structured narrative (Part I)
- A practical inventory of datasets and initiatives (Part II)
- Three reproducible research deliverables (Original research)

## Definitions of “inclusion” and “equity”

*Placeholder:* Clarify what you mean by:
- Inclusion in sampling and participation
- Inclusion in analysis (stratification, fairness)
- Equitable governance and benefit sharing

## Take-away

*Placeholder:* 3–5 bullet points.
